title: teramnus andongensis
intro: Teramnus andongensis, also known as the Andong pea or Andong-bean, is a plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Korea and other parts of Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Teramnus andongensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various gastrointestinal issues, making it a valuable component in herbal remedies. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is typically used as a tea or decoction, and its seeds are dried and used as a powder for various medicinal applications.
